day4_after_start.name: Me
day4_after_start.text: *After school. The bell rang. The classroom empties out. Everything I learned today swirls in my head.*

day4_after_start_2.name: Me
day4_after_start_2.text: *What I saw in the basement. The charts. The observation journal. Yuna. ...The true face of this school.*

day4_after_start_3.name: Me
day4_after_start_3.text: *Sea is heading toward the student council room. Eunsu should be in the faculty office. Riin is in the nurse's office. ...Who do I go to first?*

day4_after_sea_route.name: Me
day4_after_sea_route.text: *I followed Sea to the student council room.*

day4_after_sea_2.name: Me
day4_after_sea_2.text: *Sea locks the door. Click. The sound of the lock echoed especially loud. In the empty hallway.*

day4_after_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_3.text: "I wanted it to be just us today."

day4_after_sea_4.name: Me
day4_after_sea_4.text: *Sea sits down. Her eyes are different from usual. Bloodshot. Traces of crying.*

day4_after_sea_5.name: Me
day4_after_sea_5.text: *Through the window, I can see the schoolyard. Since school's out, students are leaving in small groups. All with the same smile.*

day4_after_sea_7.name: Me
day4_after_sea_7.text: *Sea looks at me. For a long time. As if trying to memorize my face.*

day4_after_sea_10.name: Me
day4_after_sea_10.text: *Sea's lips tremble. She starts to speak, stops. Starts again, stops. On the third try, she opens her mouth.*

day4_after_sea_force.name: Me
day4_after_sea_force.text: *'Forget it.' How cruel that word is in this situation -- only Sea knows. Choices appear.*

day4_after_sea_accept.name: Me
day4_after_sea_accept.text: *The moment I pick a choice -- the screen freezes for 0.3 seconds. Both choices flicker simultaneously, then merge into one. No matter which one I pick, the same result. For Sea, 'choices' are meaningless -- all twelve times ended the same way.*

day4_after_sea_accept_3.name: Me
day4_after_sea_accept_3.text: *Sea looks out the window. The sunset paints the student council room in red.*

day4_after_sea_12loop_3.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_3.text: "For twelve times... every time in this student council room, you'd smile and say 'I'll come again tomorrow.' Every time you'd say 'thank you' to me. Every time you'd say my lunch box was delicious."

day4_after_sea_12loop_4.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_4.text: "And every time... on the fifth day, you forgot me."

day4_after_sea_12loop_5.name: Me
day4_after_sea_12loop_5.text: *Tears fall from Sea's eyes. She doesn't wipe them.*

day4_after_sea_12loop_6.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_6.text: "The ninth time... you made me a bracelet. With 'Sea' engraved on it. I still have it."

day4_after_sea_12loop_7.name: Me
day4_after_sea_12loop_7.text: *Sea rolls up her sleeve. A worn thread bracelet is wrapped around her wrist. The thread is frayed. Looks years old.*

day4_after_sea_12loop_8.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_8.text: "The tenth time, you looked at this and asked 'that's pretty, who gave it to you?'"

day4_after_sea_12loop_9.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_9.text: "You made it for me. But you had no memory of it."

day4_after_sea_12loop_11.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_11.text: "I wish this time would be different. Every time, I wished it would be different."

day4_after_sea_12loop_13.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_13.text: "...{name} doesn't remember, but. I remember all twelve times."

day4_after_sea_12loop_14.name: Me
day4_after_sea_12loop_14.text: *Sea hugged me. Her hands tighten behind my back.*

day4_after_sea_12loop_15.name: Me
day4_after_sea_12loop_15.text: *...This trembling. I can hear Sea's heartbeat. Fast. Irregular. This is -- the heartbeat of someone on the verge of breaking.*

day4_after_sea_12loop_17.name: Me
day4_after_sea_12loop_17.text: *Sea's possessiveness was born from twelve cycles of trauma. The pain of falling in love every five days, then meeting again a person who's lost all memory. 'Don't change' really meant 'don't forget me,' and 'stay by my side always' really meant 'never disappear again.'*

day4_after_sea_12loop_20.name: Han Sea
day4_after_sea_12loop_20.text: "...But at least for today. Stay here with me."

day4_after_eunsu_route.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_route.text: *I headed to the faculty office. I can't avoid this anymore. I need to ask directly.*

day4_after_eunsu_2.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_2.text: *Eunsu sees me and sighs. A tired expression. Dark circles under his eyes. He's alone in the faculty office. All the other teachers have left their seats. -- Did they leave, or were they made to leave?*

day4_after_eunsu_5.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_5.text: *He speaks while making coffee. Calmly. His hands don't shake while pouring. As if he'd been prepared for this conversation.*

day4_after_eunsu_6.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_6.text: "I never wanted it to be like this from the start."

day4_after_eunsu_7.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_7.text: "The first time... you ran after three days. We caught you and wiped your memory."

day4_after_eunsu_8.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_8.text: "Back then, it was just work. Subject management. Nothing more, nothing less."

day4_after_eunsu_9.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_9.text: "Around the third time... you came to the faculty office and said 'Teacher, can I get career counseling?' The same words with the same expression every time."

day4_after_eunsu_10.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_10.text: "That's when I felt something was off. Hearing the same words for the third time -- why did it hurt?"

day4_after_eunsu_11.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_11.text: *He takes a sip of coffee. A lip mark remains on the cup.*

day4_after_eunsu_12.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_12.text: "Around the fifth time... I started looking forward to your visits."

day4_after_eunsu_13.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_13.text: "If I wipe your memory, I get to meet you again. Starting from day one. You'd come say hello to me again."

day4_after_eunsu_15.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_15.text: "If I wipe your memory, everything gets fixed. That first morning when you transferred in... we can always go back there."

day4_after_eunsu_16.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_16.text: *His hand is shaking. The coffee cup trembles slightly.*

day4_after_eunsu_17.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_17.text: "...Whether this is love or obsession, I don't even know anymore. After twelve repeats... the boundary disappears."

day4_after_eunsu_19.name: Eunsu
day4_after_eunsu_19.text: "It's okay, {name}. I'll take care of everything."

day4_after_eunsu_20.name: Me
day4_after_eunsu_20.text: *His hand strokes my hair. Gently. Warmly. ...Twelve times. Twelve times this hand stroked my hair. Twelve times he said 'it's okay.' Twelve times he wiped my memory. **That warmth is terrifying.***

day4_after_riin_route.name: Me
day4_after_riin_route.text: *I went to the nurse's office. Not for medicine. There's something I need to confirm.*

day4_after_riin_2.name: Me
day4_after_riin_2.text: *Riin is sitting at her desk. She was organizing documents. When I walked in -- her hand stopped. She flipped the papers over. Slowly. Casually. But I saw it. The title: 'S-13 Dosage Records.'*

day4_after_riin_4.name: Me
day4_after_riin_4.text: *The eyes watching me are different from usual. Guarded eyes. ...No, not guarded. Assessing. Eyes gauging what I know.*

day4_after_riin_6.name: Me
day4_after_riin_6.text: *Silence. Three seconds. Riin's expression doesn't change. No surprise. No panic.*

day4_after_riin_8.name: Me
day4_after_riin_8.text: *One sentence. Calmly. As if -- she'd been waiting for this moment. Riin stands up. Checks the nurse's office door. Locks it.*

day4_after_riin_10.name: Me
day4_after_riin_10.text: "Everything. The charts. The observation journal. Yuna."

day4_after_riin_11.name: Me
day4_after_riin_11.text: *Riin lets out a sigh. Long. Like setting down a burden she's been carrying.*

day4_after_riin_12.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_12.text: "...That was fast. Faster than the twelfth."

day4_after_riin_13.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_13.text: "The seventh... when he tried to escape with Seolhwa. That's when I started feeling something was wrong too."

day4_after_riin_14.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_14.text: "That's when I started reducing the dosage. Little by little. Making sure Eunsu didn't notice."

day4_after_riin_15.name: Me
day4_after_riin_15.text: *Riin reaches into her pocket and pulls something out. A key. A small metal key.*

day4_after_riin_16.name: Me
day4_after_riin_16.text: *She starts to hold it out to me -- then stops.*

day4_after_riin_18.name: Me
day4_after_riin_18.text: *She puts the key back in her pocket.*

day4_after_riin_20.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_20.text: "The emergency exit key for the old building. Tomorrow."

day4_after_riin_21.name: Me
day4_after_riin_21.text: *Riin looks at me. For the first time -- with eyes that aren't a school nurse's.*

day4_after_riin_22.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_22.text: "Don't do anything tonight. Don't tell anyone about this."

day4_after_riin_25.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_25.text: "Just wait until tomorrow morning. I need time to prepare too."

day4_after_riin_26.name: Me
day4_after_riin_26.text: *Riin looks out the window. The setting sun. The nurse's office is bathed in orange light.*

day4_after_riin_27.name: Riin
day4_after_riin_27.text: "...I can't do this anymore either. This."

day4_after_end.name: Me
day4_after_end.text: *The sun has set. The school sinks into darkness. Tomorrow is coming. The fifth day.*
